description: CTE with parameterized WHERE clause passes parameters through
name: cte_with_params
query_sql:
-- @name GetUsersByStatus
-- @returns :many
WITH filtered AS (SELECT id, name FROM users WHERE status = $1) SELECT * FROM filtered
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', bio TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now())
